description: Latest Claude-started run repeatedly hit the same evidence_surface_incomplete failure and the orchestrator kept idle-recovering into new solver attempts.

syntheticMessages.text: Cumulative mechanics through level 1: ACTION1 has one confirmed reusable effect. It lifts each visible striped 5x5 cluster_a block upward by exactly 5 cells when the destination lane is empty 3-space, and in the same step it opens a one-column doorway on the left edge of a two-row barrier_b that is anchored against 5 tiles.

assertions: Fresh-run replay is only validated for the opening ACTION1 on level 1.
